segments.speaker: Rep
segments.text: Last time you mentioned chasing invoices over email and that Dana's frustrated with the manual process. I built today's demo around exactly that.

segments.speaker: Rep
segments.text: So here's the collections workspace. Context: this is your over-60 bucket. Capability: it auto-prioritizes by risk. Impact: your team stops guessing who to chase first.

segments.speaker: Rep
segments.text: Is this how your team triages today, or is it more first-come-first-served?

segments.speaker: Prospect
segments.text: Honestly it's whoever shouts loudest. So this would help.

segments.speaker: Rep
segments.text: Let me show you the dashboard. And then we have reporting, and exports, and the audit log, and reminders, and templates.

segments.speaker: Prospect
segments.text: That's a lot. Which of these actually moves my DSO?

segments.speaker: Rep
segments.text: Right — the prioritization plus automated reminders. Most teams pull DSO down a week or two.

segments.speaker: Prospect
segments.text: We'd want to see that tied to our numbers.

segments.speaker: Rep
segments.text: Totally. I'll send the deck over and we can find time to reconnect.
